prose: The frontier-orbital analysis for aniline was carried out using DFT at the level B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF), in the gas phase. This calculation used charge 0, multiplicity 1, and the geometry provided in the file /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz without further optimization. SCF converged in 9 cycles. HOMO energy = -5.55377 eV, LUMO energy = -0.248954 eV, and the HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.30482 eV (orbital-energy gap, Koopmans approximation). Calculation trustworthy and completed successfully with no warnings reported.
